prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SLUICEBOXKIT-10PC-ALUM Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 10pc All-in-One Beginner Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit with 1/8 Classifier Screen and Gold Pans Description: The ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime.

The backbone of this kit is made up of the ASR Outdoor Backpack Folding Sluice Box for Gold Panning features a 3-piece folding design and a 50-inch gravity fed channel, together creating this high recovery gold panning and mineral collection tool. In addition, the gold prospecting sluice box is easily portable, folding down in size by simply loosening the connecting wing nuts. The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded; This takes care of the most common complaint about some models that often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

This lightweight, aluminum folding sluice box incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere. Plus, the gold panning sluice box carry strap is removable and adjustable, extending to 54 inches so that it can be used as either a hand carry strap or shoulder strap. Notably, this allows the carry strap to be easily removed when the sluice is in action. The body of the sluice box is made of rust-resistant aluminum, allowing to use this gold panning sluice box for many gold recovery seasons to come.

The sluice riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long rust-free service Search Terms: gold panning prospecting sifting tools sluice box classifier screen gold panning kit beginner prospecting starter set sluice equipment mining hobby paydirt recovery river creek dredge classifier snuffer bottle suction tweezers vial field gear outdoors adventure treasure Features: - BEGINNER GOLD PANNING SLUICE BOX KIT: Includes all the gold panning components to start yourself in the right direction to find gold anywhere outdoors; dont settle for anything less than quality gold prospecting tools in the hunt for gold; these ASR Outdoor high quality tools will help you strike it rich in the great outdoors. Everything comes out of the box, ready to deploy gold mining equipment - GOLD PANS & 1/8 CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Utilizing a 1/8 classifier screen to refine your paydirt is an essential first step in processing higher volumes of gold bearing paydirt through your gold mining sluice box; additionally this 10pc starter kit Includes a large 14 inch gold pan to test your raw paydirt for fine minerals and 10 inch clean up pan to identify how much gold you have in your pay dirt - 50 INCH FOLDING SLUICE BOX: Our gold prospecting sluice box is very portable, folding down in size by simply loosening the connecting wing nuts; comes with miners moss and is fully assembled out of the box; the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded; no tools needed - FINE GOLD CLEAN UP ACCESSORIES: Comes with fine gold collection and identification tools to help you once you're done in the field and processing your clean up; collection vials, magnifying tweezer, 4oz gold snifter bottle and our heavy duty 12.5" gold prospecting sand scoop for feeding your sluice box and keeping your operation going - Includes and the basic gold panning tools needed to get started outdoors for a adventourous season of gold prospecting; good luck and we hope you strike it rich === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10pc Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 50 Inch Folding Sluice Box, 18 Classifier Screen, 14 Inch And 10 Inch Gold Pans, Aluminum, Beginner Prospecting Kit
